leads.notes: Automation agency founder. Uses Make/Zapier for client projects.

leads.name: Marcus Chen
leads.notes: Builds no-code automation tutorials for founders. 5K+ audience of indie hackers wanting to automate without coding. Perfect fit for Python Scripts Bundle (automation scripts) + Zapier Templates (no-code workflows). Could do a tutorial video partnership or affiliate deal.
leads.outreach_notes: Pitch Python Scripts Bundle + Zapier Templates combo. Offer affiliate partnership - he promotes to his audience, gets commission. Content partnership opportunity: he makes tutorial videos using our tools.

leads.name: Lena Xu
leads.notes: Solo SaaS founder building email automation tools. Currently paying $149/mo for Zapier + $49/mo for Make. Total $198/mo on automation subscriptions. Burning cash on tools that eat into margins on her $29/mo micro-SaaS. Perfect fit: Python Scripts Bundle (replace Zapier with self-hosted scripts) + Zapier Templates (migrate existing workflows). AI Prompts Bundle for customer email sequences. One-time $99 bundle vs $198/mo = pays for itself in 2 weeks.
leads.outreach_notes: Lead with savings angle: 'You spend $198/mo on automation. Our bundle is $99, one-time. Pays for itself in 2 weeks.' Specific hook: offer free migration assistance for her top 3 Zapier workflows to our templates. Pain point: subscription fatigue on micro-SaaS margins.

leads.name: Tomás Reverter
leads.notes: B2B SaaS founder running a database monitoring tool. Pays $249/mo on automation (Zapier Enterprise + custom webhook integrations). Building in public, 2.3K Twitter followers. Strong fit for Python Scripts Bundle (self-host the webhook handlers and save $150+/mo) + Zapier Templates (migrate existing Zaps). Open to one-time purchases — already bought 3 lifetime deals. Active in indie hacker communities, potential affiliate + content partner.
leads.outreach_notes: Lead with 'self-host your automation webhooks, save $150/mo vs Zapier Enterprise'. He's already comfortable with lifetime deals so the one-time payment model will resonate. Offer migration of his top 2 Zapier webhooks to Python scripts. Potential Twitter collab: he tweets about 'how I cut my SaaS costs', we supply the scripts.

leads.notes: RPA expert certified in Google Gemini and Laiye RPA. Builds automation solutions for businesses in HK. Very relevant for Python Scripts Bundle - builds RPA workflows using Laiye, Python could complement his offerings.
leads.outreach_notes: Guessed email address (curtis.li.rpx@gmail.com). LinkedIn outreach also possible. Very technical audience - emphasize Python Scripts Bundle quality and documentation.

leads.notes: Helps non-tech creators with AI-powered automation. HK-based. Passionate about democratizing automation. Perfect fit for Zapier Templates and AI Prompts Bundle - helps non-technical users implement automation.
leads.outreach_notes: Guessed email address (shrestha@elysiumai.io). LinkedIn outreach also possible. Emphasize ease-of-use and no-code aspects. AI Prompts Bundle particularly relevant for their non-technical audience.
